'''Liam Tindall''' (born 27 September 2001) is an English professional [[rugby league]] [[footballer]] who plays as a {{rlp|wg}}er for the [[London Broncos]] in the [[RFL Championship]]. He has played for the [[England Knights]] at international level.

He has previously played for the [[Leeds Rhinos]] and [[Hull FC]] in the [[Super League]]. Tindall has spent time on loan from [[Leeds Rhinos|Leeds]] at [[Doncaster R.L.F.C.|Doncaster]] and the [[Bradford Bulls]]. He also spent time on loan at [[Bradford Bulls|Bradford]] from [[Hull FC|Hull]].

==Career==
===Leeds Rhinos===
Tindall made his Super League debut in round 14 of the [[Super League XXV results|2020 Super League season]] for Leeds against the [[Catalans Dragons]].<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://www.skysports.com/rugby-league/leeds-vs-catalans/teams/54288|title=Starting Lineups - Leeds vs Catalans|publisher=Sky Sports |date=30 September 2020}}</ref><ref>{{Cite web|url=https://www.superleague.co.uk/article/1587/round-14-fixtures-confirmed|title=Round 14 fixtures confirmed|publisher=Sky Sports |date=29 September 2020}}</ref><ref>{{Cite web|url=https://www.yorkshireeveningpost.co.uk/sport/rugby-league/leeds-rhinos-6-catalans-dragons-34-youthful-rhinos-impress-spirited-display-against-dragons-2988868|title=Leeds Rhinos 6 Catalans Dragons 34: Youthful Rhinos impress in spirited display against Dragons |publisher=Yorkshire Evening Post |first=Peter |last=Smith |date=30 September 2020}}</ref>

Tindall scored his first Super League try in round 17 vs [[St Helens RLFC|St Helens]].<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://www.skysports.com/rugby-league/st-helens-vs-leeds/report/54307|title=St Helens 40-8 Leeds |publisher=Sky Sports |date=23 October 2020}}</ref>
===Hull FC===
On 2 Oct 2023 it was reported he had signed for [[Hull FC]] on a 2-year deal.<ref>{{cite web|website=Love Rugby League|date=2 Oct 2023|accessdate=8 Oct 2023|title=Leeds Rhinos flier becomes Hull FC’s fifth new signing for 2024: ‘Keen to make himself a regular player in Super League’|url=https://www.loverugbyleague.com/post/leeds-rhinos-flier-liam-tindall-becomes-hull-fc-fifth-new-signing-for-2024}}</ref>

===Bradford Bull (loan)===
On 9 May 2024 it was reported he had signed for the [[Bradford Bulls]] on a one-month loan.<ref>{{cite web|website=Telegraph & Argus|date=9 May 2024|title= Hull FC winger Liam Tindall joins Bradford Bulls on loan |url= https://www.thetelegraphandargus.co.uk/sport/sportlatest/24309621.hull-fc-winger-liam-tindall-joins-bradford-bulls-loan/}}</ref>

===London Broncos===
On 20 February 2025 it was reported that he had signed for the [[London Broncos]] in the [[RFL Championship]].<ref>{{cite web|website=Love Rugby League|date=20 Feb 2025|author=Ben Olawumi|title=Former Hull FC man out to ‘prove people wrong’ after sealing Championship deal for 2025|url=https://www.loverugbyleague.com/post/former-hull-fc-man-out-to-prove-people-wrong-after-sealing-championship-deal-for-2025}}</ref>
